# Claim For Sure

> Claim For Sure (by Sidheswar Enterprises) helps Indian policyholders buy insurance and recover rejected, delayed, or underpaid insurance claims — across health, motor, life, home, travel, and personal accident cover.

Claim For Sure is a licensed POSP partner of RenewBuy for policy sales, and provides independent claim-assistance services including document preparation, insurer grievance follow-ups, IRDAI Bima Bharosa filings, and Insurance Ombudsman representation. We do not guarantee claim approval; final decisions rest with the insurer or competent authority.

## Pages

- [Home](/): Insurance claim help and policy buying in India.
- [Claim Help](/claim-help): Assistance for health, motor, life, home, travel, and personal-accident claims.
- [Buy Insurance](/policies): Compare and buy health, motor, term-life, personal accident, travel, and home policies via our RenewBuy POSP.
- [How It Works](/how-it-works): Our 4-step process from free case review to claim recovery.
- [FAQ](/faq): Common questions about fees, timelines, rejected claims, and insurers we work with.
- [About](/about): Founder story and mission of Claim For Sure by Sidheswar Enterprises.
- [Appreciation Program](/appreciation): Rewards for referrals and long-term customers.
